🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Brodie Castle
*Country:* scotland
*Region:* northeast tayside
*County:* Moray
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 16th century
*Coords:* 57.5984505, -3.7089562
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brodie_Castle
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Brodie%20Castle%20Moray%20scotland
*Main Image:* https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/place-photos/AJRVUZP9x525NA__rLZzkV51hps8YNkNi1E_mpypQtHgbya4rw9QqJLFeHbTB5f67D4OWm3Cr2EgT_z2GRSj4pe72srN1YWP-v6wQs9hnRTx4Fg8GHI_zUy-nQFuHVEV8R6VvsC5v4cME1s_iHAVsU8=s4800-w1200
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* google
*Has Wikipedia:* unknown
*Has Google Places:* unknown

*Description:*
Brodie Castle is a well-preserved Z-plan tower house located north of Brodie about 3.5 miles west of Forres, in Moray, Scotland. It is a Category A listed building, and the grounds are included in the Inventory of Gardens and Designed Landscapes in Scotland.

_Listing 7 of 10_

*Description:*
Dudhope Castle is an extended late medieval tower house located on the southern face of Dundee Law in Dundee, Scotland.

_Listing 8 of 10_
